div.p: Handling joins and leaves in distributed training
old_lr = 1e-4 scale = new_size / old_size = 4/3 new_lr = old_lr * scale = 1.33e-4

ol.li:
Reassign DP ranks:
Worker 0 → rank 0
Worker 1 → rank 1
Worker 3 → rank 2 (was rank 3)

div.h1: All workers meet at rendezvous point

div.p: old_size = 4 new_size = 3 old_lr = 1.33e-4 scale = new_size / old_size = 3/4 new_lr = old_lr * scale = 1.0e-4
